programmes.show_description: A Mother, A Murder & A Manhunt. A bitter custody battle ends in tragedy when a toddler is found dead. A three-year manhunt ensues to track down her killer - her own mother. S1, Ep3
The Tragedy Of Alfie Steele. In 2021, 9-year-old Alfie Steele was found unresponsive. His mother is seemingly shocked, but the police soon become suspicious when they dig deeper. S1, Ep4
Nowhere Girl. In 2020, Dioneth Lopez's body turned up in the woodlands of Washington State. Detectives must find surveillance to piece together her final hour. S9, Ep13
The Big Guy. On Valentine's Day, Demetrius Graves is fatally stabbed. Two days later, Bonnie Ross turns up dead. Police learn they shared one fateful connection. S9, Ep14
Teleshopping.

Teleshopping.
Infallible Witness. Learn the ways that investigators are always on the cutting edge of new forensic techniques, helping them solve cases and catch criminals more swiftly. S2, Ep8
Living in Terror. See how, in the 1993 World Trade Center bombing, DNA was traced to the bomber through the saliva that remained on the back of a mailing label. S2, Ep10
Radical Agenda. New Jersey state trooper Phillip Lamanco is shot dead on duty. Detectives try to find his killers. Is there a link to a terrorist future plot? S6, Ep4
The Killing Zone. The violent activities of gang members from the 'K Street Crew' are investigated by the Safe Streets Task Force. S6, Ep5
Darren Vickers. Eight-year-old Jamie Lavis was on the bus Darren Vickers was driving before he disappeared. Vickers joined the hunt and spoke on TV - but was hiding an awful truth. S3, Ep5
Fateful Crossing. When an officer dies in the line of duty, the fraternity of law enforcement bands together to make sure that justice is brought to those responsible. S5, Ep17
Deadly Influence. Following the FBI investigators, special agents and detectives as they solve some of the toughest cases. S5, Ep18
Without Mercy. Re-examines the investigation into a US bank heist of 1997, in which two armed men opened fire on staff and police officers at close range without mercy. S6, Ep1
Secrets Laid Bare. 19-year-old Francine discovers her parents murdered in their home. As detectives dig deeper into this seemingly perfect family, they uncover a scandalous secret. S1, Ep2
A Legacy In Question. When a young man who is next in line to inherit a family ranch in Colorado goes missing in 2015, an investigation reveals lies, greed, and deceit. S1, Ep4
Killer Cuts. A popular resident of Eastman, Georgia, mysteriously disappears. As the search for him intensifies, police make a horrific discovery and focus on an unlikely suspect. S3, Ep2
Diabolical Devil. A religious community mourns an elderly couple when they are murdered in their home. Investigators uncover a web of lies and wicked desires. S3, Ep5
Disappearance Act. When a mother of three goes missing, the small town of Renovo search everywhere for her. Two suspicious ransom notes could lead police to a suspect. S1, Ep1
Murder is A Heavy Burden. When a hardworking trucker is shot dead in his truck, detectives are left with few clues to find his killer. Two years later, a confession cracks the case. S1, Ep8
Lowe. When Katherine Smith connects with Tony Moore on a dating site, she believes she's finally found love. But her dreams shatter when his true identity is revealed. S4, Ep3
He Put Me In The Dog Cage. As Christy copes with her dad's death and her son's diagnosis, her childhood crush, Joel, comes to the rescue. But soon she must fight for her life. S10, Ep19
Levi Bellfield. Levi Bellfield denied his connection to a series of murders and rapes, but videotaped police interviews tell a different story. Experts spot the giveaway signs. S3, Ep1
The Eyedrop Killer. In 2018, a distressed woman reported the sudden death of her husband. But his family quickly suspect that all is not as it seems and demands the truth. S1, Ep5
The Chicken Factory Killer. When Kamil's wife vanishes, he becomes the primary suspect. Police face a battle to prove their case in court until new evidence changes everything. S1, Ep6
Too Much Video. In 2010, three men are murdered in a convenience store. CCTV uncovers evidence of a robbery gone wrong and offers clues to the killer's identity. S9, Ep15
Austin Serial Bomber. In 2018, an explosion kills Anthony House on his doorstep. As police investigate, another bomb goes off. CCTV helps police find the serial bomber. S9, Ep16

Lasting Impressions. No matter how clean a crime scene appears to be, the culprit often leaves something behind. Even a fingerprint or shoe tread can lead to a conviction. S3, Ep3
A Taste of Poison. Poisoners: devious killers relying on their victim's trust in order to steal their lives. Find out why they don't usually stop at just one kill. S3, Ep9
Deadly Takeover. Two gunmen rob a Seattle bank. One of the gunmen is killed in a firefight with police, while the other escapes after assaulting a family. Can he be caught? S6, Ep6
The Perfect Heist. The FBI is called after a vault door refuses to open as it has been blasted into from the ceiling and over $2 million in valuables is gone. S6, Ep7
Alice Ruggles. After Alice Ruggles ends their romantic relationship, her ex-boyfriend Harry Dhillon's refusal to let go turns sinister. S4, Ep6
Living In Sin. Two female nursing assistants in a devout community in Pennsylvania fall in love. Tragedy strikes when the burden of reconciling sexuality and faith becomes too much. S4, Ep1
Maura Murray: Miles to Nowhere. On a moonless, windy night Maura's car swerves and leaves the road - she is never seen again. But what happened to her? S1, Ep2
All Eyes On Megan. When a teenager goes missing, detectives struggle for leads. But when surveillance cameras reveal her kidnapping, the case becomes a race to bring her home alive. S3, Ep3
Matron Knows Best. Anne Grigg-Booth injected patients with high doses of drugs, murdering three of them. Experts analyse the actions of this disturbing serial killer. S2, Ep2
It Was All Of Them. In 1991, a seemingly close-knit family is destroyed by a series of brutal killings by one of their own. What could have caused this murderous betrayal? S6, Ep5
Hoop Dreams. In 2014, 19-year-old Keonte Chavis was murdered and left in the woods in Seale, Alabama. With little forensic evidence, police turned to her relatives. S6, Ep10
He's Not Going To Stop. In Arizona, a community is shocked when an unknown shooter goes on a killing spree. Police bodycams capture the hunt for the murderer. S3, Ep2
Gladys Godfrey/Ian McNicholl. How did forensic technology help track down the killer of Gladys Godfrey? Plus, Ian McNicholl tells the horrific story of his abusive ex-girlfriend. S5, Ep2
Must Find Mickey. 21-year-old Mickey Shunick is missing after a night out. Police are unable to find any trace of the Louisiana student until they spot her on surveillance video. S2, Ep1
Egypt: Terror In Paradise. In 2005, a couple's holiday in Sharm El Sheikh, Egypt, is shattered when a series of bombs are detonated. Their parents discuss their desperate search. S1, Ep6
Kim Edwards / Lucas Markham. Teen lovers Kim Edwards and Lucas Markham were convicted of murdering her mum, Elizabeth and younger sister, Katie in April 2016. What led them to kill? S1, Ep4
Alice Ruggles. After Alice Ruggles ends their romantic relationship, her ex-boyfriend Harry Dhillon's refusal to let go turns sinister. S4, Ep6
